description: 語言學習效果優化（理解檢查/變體遷移/修復策略/檢索複習/guided rubric/followup 設計）

tasks.desc: Comprehension check taxonomy + payload spec: info_extract / intent / next_response / sequence, with authoring examples and PM evaluation rules.
Transform practice spec: slot/scenario/function/politeness/correction transform types and progression rules for A1/A2.
Repair strategy practice spec: trigger recognition + repair response categories (repeat/slow_down/rephrase/confirm/reject_replace).
Review retrieval target spec: form/function/mixed retrieval design, examples, and unit placement guidelines.
Guided output completion rubric spec: task completion conditions, required elements, acceptable variants, and common mistake hints.
Dictionary pack production-readiness tags: production_ready/input_only, frame refs, and register hints for A1/A2.
Followup semantics spec: review vs transfer followups, transfer_pattern_refs usage, and cross-unit task clarity rules.
Listening discrimination micro-node proposal (optional): minimal TTS-supported listening checks for survival bottlenecks.
Integrate pedagogy metadata into contracts/templates/checkers: UNITFAC-001 contract freeze inputs, UNITFAC-005 templates, UNITFAC-004 mockup-check warnings.
Pilot application + review: patch A1-U04/A1-U05 (or next 2 PR-ready units) with selected pedagogy upgrades and document outcomes before freeze.
PM educational QA checklist v2: convert pedagogy optimizations into PM trial checklist items and issue triage labels.
Freeze readiness recommendation for UNITFAC-001: confirm which pedagogy fields/rules are stable enough for contract freeze vs deferred.
